StudentCtl - Class in com.rays.ctl
StudentCtl is a REST Controller for handling Student related operations.

DAO for Student entity
StudentDAOImpl - Class in com.rays.dao
StudentDAOImpl is the DAO implementation class for StudentDTO.

StudentDAOInt - Interface in com.rays.dao
StudentDAOInt is a DAO interface for StudentDTO.
StudentDTO - Class in com.rays.dto
StudentDTO is a Data Transfer Object (DTO) class that represents student details in the system.
StudentDTO() - Constructor for class com.rays.dto.StudentDTO
 
StudentForm - Class in com.rays.form
StudentForm is a Form Bean class used to capture student-related input data from the user interface.

Student ID (foreign key reference)
